event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 4 venue canonicalization: Skeleton Bones, Edmonds College.
event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
The initial scores were adjusted based on the rules that the controls had to be in pairs according to the course maps (101-201,, 102-202, etc.), control #177 had to be punched to take controls on Map 2, and the max time was 75 minutes.
